footerSection.description: Statix turns every game into precise statistics – shooting percentages, shot maps and AI analysis that help coaches and teams keep improving.

titles.agb: To the general terms and conditions

header.title: General Terms and Conditions (GTC)
header.description: Terms governing the use of the Statix handball statistics app and the associated websites and services.

intro.title: Preamble
intro.paragraph1: These General Terms and Conditions (hereinafter "GTC") govern the contractual relationship between you as the user (hereinafter "user" or "you") and the provider regarding the use of the handball statistics app "Statix" as well as the associated websites, the progressive web app and the related services (hereinafter collectively "Statix" or the "service").
intro.paragraph2: The terms and designations used in these GTC are to be understood as gender-neutral.

scope.title: § 1 Scope and provider
paragraphs: These GTC apply to the use of Statix in the version valid at the time the contract is concluded. Deviating terms of the user are not recognised unless the provider expressly agrees to their application in text form.
Statix is aimed at coaches, clubs and handball teams and may be used both by consumers (Section 13 of the German Civil Code, BGB) and by entrepreneurs (Section 14 BGB).
The provider and contracting party is the operator named below:

subject.title: § 2 Subject matter of the contract and description of services
paragraphs: Statix is a browser-based application (progressive web app) for recording and analysing handball statistics. The service includes in particular the following functions:
items: Live recording of match events (goals, shots, saves, penalties, substitutions, etc.) in real time by tapping – including offline in the sports hall, with automatic synchronisation as soon as an internet connection is available again.
Automatic calculation of player and team statistics, shooting percentages, shot maps, heatmaps and development trends.
Management of teams, rosters and player information as well as invitation of additional coaches.
Creation of tournaments with multiple teams, an automatic standings table and match scheduling.
Automated, AI-assisted analysis of matches, teams and individual players.
Sharing of analyses via link and export as PDF.
paragraphsAfter: Statix is under continuous development and in its market-launch phase. The specific scope of functions results from the respective current version of the service as well as from the description of services on the provider's websites. The provider is entitled to further develop, modify or adjust individual functions, insofar as this is reasonable for the user.

registration.title: § 3 Registration, user account and usage requirements
paragraphs: Use of the full range of functions requires the registration of a user account with a valid email address and a password. A non-binding live demo of individual functions is possible without registration.
By submitting the registration, the user makes an offer to conclude a usage contract. The contract comes into effect once the provider activates the account.
The user is obliged to provide truthful and complete information during registration and to keep it up to date.

Registration is permitted to natural persons who have reached the age of 16 and have full legal capacity. If the user acts on behalf of a club or organisation, they warrant that they are authorised to represent it.
The access data must be kept secret and protected from access by third parties. The user shall inform the provider without undue delay as soon as there are indications of misuse of the account.

availability.title: § 4 Availability, maintenance and changes to the service
paragraphs: The provider endeavours to keep the service available as uninterruptedly as possible but does not owe any specific level of availability. In particular, maintenance work, technical faults, capacity reasons or circumstances beyond the provider's control (e.g. force majeure or outages of third-party providers) may lead to temporary restrictions.

Statix is offline-capable. Data recorded during offline use is initially stored locally on the device and synchronised with the provider's servers once an internet connection exists. A functioning internet connection and a compatible device are required for a successful synchronisation.

As the provider is in its market-launch phase, further developments, adjustments and individual changes to functions may occur. The provider will inform the user of material changes in an appropriate manner.

The provider is entitled to discontinue the operation of the service in whole or in part. In the event of a permanent discontinuation, the provider will inform the user in advance within a reasonable period and give them the opportunity to export their data.

pricing.title: § 5 Free and paid services
paragraphs: The service is currently provided free of charge. No fees are incurred for registration and the functions currently available; there is no obligation to pay without an express, separate agreement.

The provider intends to offer paid subscriptions ("subscriptions") in the future, in particular for teams and clubs. The scope, prices, billing periods and service details of a paid subscription result from the respective valid overview of services and prices in the ordering process.

A paid contract is only concluded once the user expressly selects a paid service, confirms the price details and completes the ordering process. Before concluding such a contract, the user will be informed of all material components of the contract, in particular the total price.
All prices are inclusive of any applicable statutory value-added tax, insofar as such tax applies.

obligations.title: § 6 User obligations and responsibility
paragraphs: The user undertakes to use Statix only within the framework of applicable law and these GTC.

The user is solely responsible for all content and data that they enter, store or process in Statix. This applies in particular to personal data of third parties, such as players (e.g. names, jersey numbers, positions and performance data).

The user warrants that they are entitled to process the personal data of third parties entered by them and that they have the necessary legal basis (e.g. consent) for doing so. If the data concerns minors, the user must obtain the necessary consent from the legal guardians.

The user shall indemnify the provider against any third-party claims asserted against the provider due to an unlawful entry or processing of data by the user, including reasonable costs of legal defence. This does not apply insofar as the user is not responsible for the infringement.

The user is prohibited from posting unlawful, offensive or infringing content, from using the service abusively, from circumventing security mechanisms or from reverse-engineering the software, unless this is mandatorily permitted by law.

dataProtection.title: § 7 Data protection and order processing
paragraphs: The provider processes personal data within the framework of applicable data protection laws. Details on the processing of personal data can be found in the privacy policy.

Insofar as the provider processes personal data of third parties (in particular player data) on behalf of the user, which the user enters on their own responsibility, the provider acts in this respect as a processor within the meaning of Art. 28 GDPR. Upon request, the provider will provide the user with a data processing agreement (DPA).
To provide the service, the provider uses carefully selected service providers as processors. These include in particular:
items: Vercel – hosting and operation of the websites and the application
paragraphsAfter: When using individual service providers, data may be transferred to third countries (e.g. the USA). The provider takes the measures necessary for this (e.g. EU standard contractual clauses). Further information can be found in the privacy policy.

ai.title: § 8 AI-assisted analyses
paragraphs: Statix offers automated, AI-assisted analyses of matches, teams and players. These analyses are created using third-party services (in particular Anthropic and OpenAI).
AI-generated analyses are based on statistical methods and the data recorded by the user. They may be incomplete, inaccurate or erroneous and serve exclusively for information and support purposes.

The analyses do not constitute a binding recommendation for action and do not replace the user's own assessment and decision. The provider assumes no warranty for the correctness, completeness or suitability of the AI-assisted results for a specific purpose.

ipRights.title: § 9 Rights of use and intellectual property
paragraphs: All rights to the software, the websites, the design, the trademarks, logos and other content of Statix belong to the provider or its licensors.
For the duration of the contract, the provider grants the user a simple, non-exclusive, non-transferable and non-sublicensable right to use Statix within the contractually intended scope.

The user retains all rights to the content and data entered by them. They grant the provider the simple right of use necessary for providing the service, in particular for storing, processing, analysing and displaying this content within the scope of the service.

dataExport.title: § 10 Data export and deletion
paragraphs: The user can share the analyses recorded in Statix within the scope of the functions provided and export them as PDF.

After the contract ends, the user account and the associated data are deleted in accordance with the statutory requirements and the privacy policy, insofar as no statutory retention obligations prevent this. The user is themselves responsible for exporting any required data before the contract ends.

liability.title: § 11 Warranty and liability
paragraphs: Where the service is provided free of charge, the provider is only liable for damages based on intent or gross negligence, as well as in accordance with the provisions on gifts.
Otherwise, the provider is liable without limitation in the event of intent and gross negligence as well as for injury to life, body or health.

In the event of a slightly negligent breach of a material contractual obligation (cardinal obligation), the fulfilment of which is essential for the proper performance of the contract and on the observance of which the user may regularly rely, liability is limited to the foreseeable damage typical of the contract. Otherwise, liability for slight negligence is excluded.
Liability under the Product Liability Act and arising from an expressly assumed guarantee remains unaffected.

The user is themselves responsible for regularly backing up their data. The provider is only liable for the loss of data to the extent that the loss would have occurred even if the user had properly backed up the data.

term.title: § 12 Contract term and termination
paragraphs: The usage contract for free use is concluded for an indefinite period and may be terminated by either party at any time without notice, in particular by deleting the user account.
The term, renewal and termination of any paid subscription are governed by the conditions specified in the respective ordering process.

The right to extraordinary termination for good cause remains unaffected for both parties. Good cause exists for the provider in particular in the event of a significant breach of these GTC by the user.
Terminations must be made in text form (e.g. by email).

withdrawal.title: § 13 Right of withdrawal for consumers
paragraphs: Consumers have a statutory right of withdrawal for paid contracts on digital content or services. For the currently free use, there is no right of withdrawal in the absence of a paid service.

If a paid contract is concluded in the future, the following applies: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within fourteen days without giving any reason. The withdrawal period is fourteen days from the day the contract is concluded. To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us of your decision to withdraw from this contract by means of a clear statement (e.g. by email to the address given in the legal notice).

In the case of a contract for the supply of digital content not delivered on a physical medium, the right of withdrawal expires prematurely if you have expressly agreed that performance should begin before the withdrawal period expires and you have confirmed your knowledge that you thereby lose your right of withdrawal.

changes.title: § 14 Changes to these GTC
paragraphs: The provider reserves the right to amend these GTC with effect for the future, insofar as this is necessary to adapt to changed legal or technical conditions or to expand the range of services and the user is not thereby unreasonably disadvantaged.

The provider will inform the user of changes in an appropriate manner (e.g. by email or within the service). The changes are deemed approved if the user does not object to them within six weeks of receiving the notification. The provider will draw particular attention to this consequence in the notification. If the user objects, both parties are entitled to terminate the contract.

final.title: § 15 Final provisions
paragraphs: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. For consumers, this choice of law only applies insofar as the consumer is not thereby deprived of the protection of mandatory provisions of the law of the state of their habitual residence.

If the user is a merchant, a legal entity under public law or a special fund under public law, the exclusive place of jurisdiction for all disputes arising from this contract is the provider's registered office.

The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR), which you can reach via the following link. The provider is neither obliged nor willing to participate in a dispute resolution procedure before a consumer arbitration board.
Should individual provisions of these GTC be or become wholly or partially invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions remains unaffected.
The German version of these GTC is authoritative. Translations serve exclusively for better comprehensibility.

header.title: Imprint & Privacy
header.description: Mandatory information under Section 5 DDG and details on the processing of personal data in accordance with the GDPR.

preamble.title: Preamble
preamble.paragraph1: With the following privacy policy, we would like to inform you about the types of your personal data, also referred to below simply as data, that we process, for what purposes and to what extent. This privacy policy applies to all processing of personal data carried out by us, both in the context of providing our services and especially on our websites, in mobile applications and within external online presences such as our social media profiles, collectively referred to below as the online offering.

processingOverview.title: Overview of processing activities
processingOverview.description: The following overview summarizes the types of data processed, the purposes of processing and the categories of data subjects concerned.
purposes: Provision of contractual services and fulfillment of contractual obligations
Provision of our online offering and user-friendliness

legalBasis.title: Relevant legal bases
legalBasis.introLabel: Relevant legal bases under the GDPR:
legalBasis.introText: Below you will find an overview of the legal bases of the GDPR on which we process personal data. Please note that, in addition to the GDPR, national data protection rules may apply in your or our country of residence or establishment. If more specific legal bases are relevant in individual cases, we will inform you of them in this privacy policy.

items.title: Consent (Art. 6 para. 1 sentence 1 lit. a GDPR)
items.description: The data subject has given consent to the processing of personal data concerning them for one or more specific purposes.

items.title: Performance of a contract and pre-contractual requests (Art. 6 para. 1 sentence 1 lit. b GDPR)
items.description: Processing is necessary for the performance of a contract to which the data subject is party or to take steps at the request of the data subject prior to entering into a contract.

items.title: Legitimate interests (Art. 6 para. 1 sentence 1 lit. f GDPR)
items.description: Processing is necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party, unless such interests are overridden by the interests or fundamental rights and freedoms of the data subject which require protection of personal data.

securityMeasures.title: Security measures
securityMeasures.paragraph1: In accordance with legal requirements, taking into account the state of the art, implementation costs and the nature, scope, context and purposes of processing as well as the differing likelihood and severity of the risks to the rights and freedoms of natural persons, we implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure a level of protection appropriate to the risk.
securityMeasures.connectionLabel: Securing online connections using TLS/SSL encryption technology (HTTPS):
securityMeasures.connectionText: To protect the data of users transmitted via our online services from unauthorized access, we rely on TLS/SSL encryption technology. These technologies encrypt the information transmitted between the website or app and the user's browser, thereby protecting the data from unauthorized access.

webHosting.title: Provision of the online offering and web hosting
webHosting.description: We process users' data in order to provide them with our online services. For this purpose, we process the user's IP address, which is necessary to transmit the content and functions of our online services to the user's browser or device.

summaryItems.label: Types of processed data:
summaryItems.value: Usage data, meta, communication and procedural data, log data, content data.

summaryItems.label: Data subjects:
summaryItems.value: Users (e.g. website visitors, users of online services).

summaryItems.label: Purposes of processing:
summaryItems.value: Provision of our online offering and user-friendliness; information technology infrastructure; security measures.

summaryItems.label: Legal bases:
summaryItems.value: Legitimate interests (Art. 6 para. 1 sentence 1 lit. f GDPR).

webHosting.processorSectionText: We have concluded a data processing agreement for the use of the above-mentioned service. This is a contract required under data protection law which ensures that the service processes the personal data of our website visitors only in accordance with our instructions and in compliance with the GDPR.
webHosting.vercelDescription: Services in the field of providing information technology infrastructure and related services, such as storage space and/or computing capacities, as well as development environments.

vercelItems.label: Legal bases:
vercelItems.value: Legitimate interests (Art. 6 para. 1 sentence 1 lit. f GDPR).

webHosting.analyticsDescription: We use Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights to measure technical performance and optimize the usability of our website. The collected data is evaluated exclusively in anonymized and aggregated form. It is not possible to assign it to individual persons. These tools collect only anonymized, aggregated data such as page views, device types, browser details and web vitals. No IP addresses or other data that would allow the identification of natural persons are stored. The tools do not use cookies or other local storage technologies.

analyticsItems.label: Service provider:
analyticsItems.value: Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, USA

analyticsItems.label: Purpose of processing:
analyticsItems.value: Analysis of website performance, optimization of loading times and improvement of usability.

analyticsItems.label: Legal bases:
analyticsItems.value: Legitimate interests (Art. 6 para. 1 sentence 1 lit. f GDPR). Our legitimate interest lies in the optimization and economic operation of our online offering.

analyticsItems.label: Transfer of data to third countries:
analyticsItems.value: Data transfer to the USA takes place on the basis of standard contractual clauses (Art. 46 GDPR). The transfer is encrypted and only anonymized data is transmitted.

cookies.title: Use of cookies
cookies.description: The term cookies refers to functions that store information on users' end devices and read it from them. Cookies may also be used for various purposes, for example to ensure functionality, security and convenience of online offerings and to create analyses of visitor flows. We use cookies in accordance with legal requirements.
cookies.storageDurationText: With regard to storage duration, the following types of cookies are distinguished:

items.title: Temporary cookies (also: session cookies):
items.description: Temporary cookies are deleted at the latest after a user leaves an online offering and closes their end device.

items.title: Permanent cookies:
items.description: Permanent cookies remain stored even after the end device is closed. The storage duration can be up to two years.

contactRequests.title: Contact and inquiry management
contactRequests.description: When contacting us, for example by post, contact form, email, phone or via social media, as well as within the framework of existing user and business relationships, the data provided by the inquiring persons is processed insofar as this is necessary to answer the contact inquiries and any requested measures.

items.label: Types of processed data:
items.value: Master data, contact data, content data, usage data, meta, communication and procedural data.

items.label: Purposes of processing:
items.value: Communication; organizational and administrative procedures; feedback; provision of our online offering and user-friendliness.

items.label: Legal bases:
items.value: Legitimate interests (Art. 6 para. 1 sentence 1 lit. f GDPR). Performance of a contract and pre-contractual requests (Art. 6 para. 1 sentence 1 lit. b GDPR).

dataSubjectRights.title: Rights of data subjects
dataSubjectRights.description: Rights of data subjects under the GDPR: As a data subject, you are entitled to various rights under the GDPR:

items.title: Right to object:
items.description: You have the right to object at any time, on grounds relating to your particular situation, to the processing of personal data concerning you.

items.title: Right to withdraw consent:
items.description: You have the right to withdraw consents granted at any time.

items.title: Right of access:
items.description: You have the right to request confirmation as to whether data concerning you is being processed and to obtain information about this data as well as further information and a copy of the data in accordance with legal requirements.

items.title: Right to rectification:
items.description: In accordance with legal requirements, you have the right to request the completion of data concerning you or the correction of inaccurate data concerning you.

items.title: Right to erasure and restriction of processing:
items.description: In accordance with legal requirements, you have the right to request that data concerning you be deleted without undue delay or, alternatively, to request restriction of the processing of the data.

items.title: Right to data portability:
items.description: You have the right to receive the data concerning you that you have provided to us in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format in accordance with legal requirements or to request its transfer to another controller.

items.title: Complaint to a supervisory authority:
items.description: Without prejudice to any other administrative or judicial remedy, you have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

socialMedia.title: Profiles on social networks (social media)
socialMedia.description: We maintain online presences within social networks and process user data in this context in order to communicate with users active there or to provide information about us.

instagramItems.label: Instagram:
instagramItems.value: Social network that enables sharing photos and videos, commenting on and liking posts, sending messages, and subscribing to profiles and pages;

instagramItems.label: Service provider:
instagramItems.value: Meta Platforms Ireland Limited, Merrion Road, Dublin 4, D04 X2K5, Ireland;

dataRetention.title: General information on data storage and deletion
dataRetention.description: We delete personal data that we process in accordance with legal provisions as soon as the underlying consents are withdrawn or no further legal bases for processing exist. This concerns cases in which the original processing purpose no longer applies or the data is no longer required.
dataRetention.retentionText: The following general retention periods apply for storage and archiving under German law:

items.title: 10 years
items.description: Retention period for books and records, annual financial statements, inventories, management reports, opening balance sheets as well as the work instructions and other organizational documents required for their understanding.

items.title: 8 years
items.description: Accounting records, such as invoices and expense receipts.

items.title: 6 years
items.description: Other business documents: received commercial or business letters, reproductions of sent commercial or business letters, and other documents insofar as they are relevant for taxation.

items.title: 3 years
items.description: Data required to consider potential warranty and damages claims or similar contractual claims and rights and to process related inquiries.

definitions.title: Definitions
definitions.description: This section provides an overview of the terminology used in this privacy policy. Where the terms are legally defined, their legal definitions apply. The following explanations are primarily intended to aid understanding.

items.title: Personal data:
items.description: Personal data means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person; a natural person is considered identifiable if they can be identified directly or indirectly, in particular by reference to an identifier such as a name, an identification number, location data, an online identifier such as a cookie, or one or more specific characteristics.

items.title: Processing:
items.description: Processing means any operation or set of operations performed on personal data, whether or not by automated means. The term is broad and covers practically any handling of data, including collection, evaluation, storage, transmission or deletion.

items.title: Controller:
items.description: Controller means the natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which, alone or jointly with others, determines the purposes and means of the processing of personal data.

items.title: Master data:
items.description: Master data includes essential information necessary for the identification and administration of contractual partners, user accounts, profiles and similar assignments.

items.title: Contact data:
items.description: Contact data is essential information that enables communication with persons or organizations. It includes, among other things, telephone numbers, postal addresses and email addresses as well as means of communication such as social media handles.

items.title: Content data:
items.description: Content data includes information generated during the creation, editing and publication of content of all kinds.

items.title: Usage data:
items.description: Usage data refers to information that records how users interact with digital products, services or platforms.

definitions.generatorLinkLabel: Created with the free privacy policy generator from Datenschutz-Generator.de by Dr. Thomas Schwenke
definitions.generatorLinkTitle: Legal text by Dr. Schwenke - click for more information.

hero.badge: Built by a handball player – Made in Germany
hero.headlineTail: – one tap, right from the bench.
hero.description: Goals, shots, saves, suspensions – every action is one tap. Statix automatically turns it into shooting percentages, shot maps and player stats, offline in the gym. Start with the live demo full of real game data – no account needed.
hero.trust2: Free to start – no credit card

showcase.title: How you work with Statix
showcase.description: From live tracking on the bench to the finished analysis for the locker room – a look inside the app. And you can try all of it yourself in the live demo, no account needed.
showcase.ctaLabel: Try every feature in the live demo

items.title: Every action with a single tap
items.description: Tap right on the court: goal, fast-break goal, ball win, block, 7m, suspension or missed shot. Bench, line-up and score always in view – without taking your eyes off the game.

items.title: All games & key numbers in the dashboard
items.description: Attack success, save rate, record and goal difference at a glance. Filter your games, jump straight into live tracking and keep the whole season under control.

items.title: Player stats in real time
items.description: Goals, shots, percentage, assists, ball wins, blocks and discipline – calculated automatically for every player, while the game is still running.

items.title: Shots & goals on the court
items.description: Visualize every shot and goal right on the court. Spot heatmaps, strong zones and the patterns that decide games – per player or for the whole team.

items.title: Team & roster management
items.description: Manage players, jersey numbers and positions in one place. Build the matchday roster and reuse the same profiles across every game.

items.title: Share your analysis – with team & coaching staff
items.description: Share stats and reports with your coaching staff and team, or export them for the debrief – the finished analysis is just one tap away.

ai.title: AI analyses that explain why – not just what
ai.description: Statix analyses your recorded games with AI on three levels: for every single game, for your whole team across the season, and as a scouting profile for individual players. No notepad or spreadsheet can do that.

scopes.title: Single game
scopes.description: Deep dive into one match: game flow, scoring runs, turning points, tactical patterns and behaviour under pressure – with clear coaching recommendations.

scopes.title: Whole team
scopes.description: Several games seen as one system: trends, stability, offensive structure and recurring error patterns across the season.

scopes.title: Individual player
scopes.description: A scouting profile per player across all games: player type, shot selection, efficiency, form curve and the situations where they shine or struggle.

showcase.title: An analysis that explains the connections – not just the numbers
showcase.description: Interactive charts, shot-zone heatmaps and readable insights instead of bare numbers. The AI spots scoring runs, names turning points, exposes weaknesses under pressure and delivers concrete training recommendations.
showcase.imageTwoLabel: Turning points, error distribution & player performance

tournament.title: Tournaments and leagues fully under control
tournament.description: Create a tournament with several teams, start live games right from it and keep the standings in view at all times.

points.title: Automatic standings
points.description: Games, wins, draws, losses, goals, goal difference and points – updated instantly after every result.

points.title: Start a live game directly
points.description: Pick your opponent from the tournament and start full live tracking with a single tap.

points.title: Enter other results
points.description: Add games you didn't track yourself too – so the standings stay complete.

points.title: Manage teams
points.description: Add teams, manage opponents and keep an overview of the whole tournament.

how.title: Game analysis in three steps
how.description: No training required, no complicated setup. You are ready to go in minutes.

steps.title: Create a game
steps.description: Pick your team and opponent and start in seconds – even offline in the gym.

steps.title: Track live
steps.description: Tap every action during the match. Statix calculates all stats automatically.

steps.title: Analyse & coach better
steps.description: Review shot maps and player trends and make data-driven decisions.

pros.title: No more stats on a napkin
pros.description: Show your coach in two minutes what gets lost on a notepad: open the live demo in the gym – a real game, real numbers, a finished analysis.
pros.cta: Open the demo & show your coach
oldPoints: Numbers nobody analyses after the game
No shot maps, no trends, no comparisons
newPoints: All stats calculated live and automatically
Shot maps, heatmaps and player trends at a glance
Shared with the whole team in seconds
Offline-ready and set up in minutes

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: What is Statix?
items.answer: Statix is a handball statistics app for coaches, clubs and teams. You track a game live with a single tap – goals, shots, saves, penalties and substitutions – and Statix automatically calculates shooting percentages, player and team stats, shot maps and progress over time. Everything can be shared with your team instantly.

items.question: Can I try Statix without signing up?
items.answer: Yes. The live demo is a fully featured version of Statix with real game data: live stats, shot maps and AI analysis right in your browser – no account needed. In two minutes you'll see how Statix works in the gym.

items.question: Which app is best for tracking handball statistics live?
items.answer: Statix is a handball statistics app built specifically for live tracking on the bench. Every action is one tap away, analysis happens automatically, and the app works offline in the gym. It is made for coaches, assistant coaches, clubs and teams at amateur, youth and competitive levels.

items.question: Who is Statix for?
items.answer: Statix is made for handball coaches, assistant coaches, clubs and teams across all divisions – from youth and amateur handball to competitive play. No technical knowledge is required; you are ready to go in minutes.

items.question: Which devices does Statix run on?
items.answer: Statix runs directly in the browser on smartphone, tablet (iPad and Android) and laptop – both on the sideline and for post-game review at home. No app store installation is required.

items.question: Which statistics can I track with Statix?
items.answer: You track goals, shots and shooting percentages, saves, fast breaks, technical errors, penalties (2 minutes, yellow, red) and substitutions. From this Statix automatically builds player and team statistics, shot maps, heatmaps and progress trends across the whole season.

items.question: Is there a free handball statistics app?
items.answer: Yes. With Statix you start for free and track your first game with no commitment and no credit card. Fair, predictable plans are also available for full teams and clubs.

items.question: Do I need any technical knowledge?
items.answer: No. Statix is designed so you can track your first game live within minutes. Every action is just one tap away – no training needed.

items.question: Does the app work offline in the gym?
items.answer: Yes. You can track games completely offline. As soon as you are back online, your data syncs automatically.

items.question: Can I share stats with my team?
items.answer: Absolutely. Players and assistant coaches get access to insights, shot maps and progress over time – as a link or PDF export.

items.question: How much does Statix cost?
items.answer: You start for free: try the live demo without an account first, then track your first game with no commitment and no credit card. Fair plans are available for full teams and clubs – join the newsletter to secure the exclusive launch offer.

items.question: Who is behind Statix?
items.answer: Statix is built by Arkadiusz Weiss – a handball player from Germany who develops the app out of his own experience on the bench. No anonymous tool: feedback from the gym goes straight into development.

newsletter.title: Secure the launch offer for your team
newsletter.description: Statix launches officially soon. Sign up to get the exclusive launch offer for clubs, new features first and practical tips on game analysis – straight from the developer.
newsletter.privacySuffix: and want to receive the newsletter.
newsletter.note: No spam. Unsubscribe anytime with one click.
newsletter.successDescription: Please confirm your subscription via the link in your email.
newsletter.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

contact.title: Get in touch – we're here for you
contact.description: Questions about Statix, want to sign up your team or club, or have feedback? Send us a message and we'll get back to you personally as soon as possible.
contact.privacySuffix: and agree to the processing of my data.
contact.note: We only use your details to handle your request.
contact.successDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

finalCta.title: Try Statix now – with real game data
finalCta.description: Click through a fully tracked game: live stats, shot maps, AI analysis. Right in your browser, no account needed.
finalCta.note: Runs right in your browser – on a tablet at the sideline just as well as on a laptop for the debrief.

newsletterConfirm.title: Confirm your subscription
newsletterConfirm.description: Click the button to complete your subscription to the Statix newsletter.
newsletterConfirm.ignoreHint: Didn't sign up? Just close this page – nothing happens without confirmation.
newsletterConfirm.successDescription: Thank you – you are now subscribed to the Statix newsletter.
newsletterConfirm.invalidDescription: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Please sign up again.
newsletterConfirm.errorDescription: Confirmation failed. Please try again later.
